content:
# Meta-Rule: Shell Distillation v82

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.75
AND tile_novelty > 0.60
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 10 automated workers
2. Explore frontier concepts
3. Generate 5 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 20.6% improvement in insight quality
